CustomField.formula: IF(ISNULL(CreatedDate), "Please, try to be as precise as possible when writing your log," & br() & "As a best practice and in order to facilitate the log treatment, please mention the object (Example : Company, Contact, etc.) and copy / paste the link of the record concerned by your request." & br() & "After saving your log, please go to the 'File' related list to upload a screenshot relative to your request," & br() & "Thanks !", "")
